text.title: Meta Audience Targeting (3-Tier) Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example showing the methodology applied to a realistic scenario, including the produced artefact.

example.description: Faion B2B SaaS scaling. Core: SaaS+Developer Tools (1.2M). Custom: site_visitors_30d + video_75pct. LAL: 1% of purchasers_180d (n=4800). Exclusions: current customers, subscribers.
example.note: Three-tier covered, Core in 500K-2M band, LAL source >1000, exclusions seeded; Advantage+ disabled (budget below gate).
